title: fix `ps --last=N`
body:
Fix `ps --last=N` to also include non-running containers. Also add an
e2e test to prevent us from regressing in the future.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@vrothberg gating barfed and left zero indication of what went wrong.  Joyous.
LGTM other than Gating inexplicably croaking.

@TomSweeneyRedHat gating runs in a container image. From quay. Nuff said.

quay is reporting [read-only mode is up](https://status.quay.io/) so I restarted gating, and it passed. I don't know if the other tests will restart automatically; looks like they won't so this and all other open PRs may need a re-push.
